name: Strawberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
19 ounces Cream cheese, softened
1/4 teaspoon Vanilla extract
1 cup Sugar
3 eggs
2 teaspoons Lemon peel, grated
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1 cup Mashed strawberries (strained)
3 tablespoons Cornstarch
1 cup Sugar
1/3 cup Water
Pre-heat oven to 350°F.
CRUST: Mix together Graham cracker crumbs and sugar. Stir in butter thoroughly and press into a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes. Cool.
Reduce oven temperature to 300°F.
FILLING: Beat cream cheese in a large mixing bowl until smooth. Gradually add sugar, beating until fluffy. Add lemon peel and vanilla extract. Beat in eggs one at a time. Pour into the shell. Bake for 1 hour or until center is firm. Cool to room temperature and then spread with the strawberry glaze. Chill for 3 hours.
GLAZE: Mix together sugar and cornstarch in a small saucepan. Add water and strawberries, stirring constantly. Cook until mixture thickens and boils. Boil and stir for 1 minute. Allow to cool thoroughly before spreading over cheesecake.
